title: World Citizens Unite! Live Dialogue with Zepp-LaRouche — March 16, 2023
description:
Discuss the world historical moment with Helga Zepp-LaRouche this week. We want to hear from you, especially your thoughts on her call for an emergency conference to reorganize the financial system https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/reorganize_the_bankrupt_financial_system

 Email in your questions, thoughts and organizing reports to 
questions@schillerinstitute.org 
or join us live and post them in the chat.

We look forward to hearing from you!
Have fun.
